The '''''Vigilant''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
[[File:Carrack_bridge.jpg|thumb|left|The bridge of the Vigilant.]]
Captain [[Deyd Llnewe]] was the commander of the ship. [[Raprice]] was also an officer on the ship. ''Vigilant'' was active in the regions around [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]], where she was patrolling the planet's rim, looking for any smugglers and other kinds of mischief.

{{Ship-stub}}
